title: Gradient Blinds
description: OGL WebGL stripe-gradient background with a moving spotlight that follows the cursor, revealing color beneath the animated blinds pattern.
prompt_text:
# Gradient Blinds

OGL WebGL stripe-gradient background with a moving spotlight that follows the cursor, revealing color beneath the animated blinds pattern.

## Use when
- Creating a premium dark hero where cursor movement reveals hidden gradient color.
- Adding depth to a product showcase with a dynamic spotlight reveal.
- Setting a structured, geometric backdrop for a value proposition section.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: ogl

## Install
```bash
npm install ogl
```

## Component — gradient-blinds.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_012.md
// Export: GradientBlinds (default)
// Props: className, style, colors (string[]), stripCount (number), spotlightRadius (number)
// Uses OGL Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle, Vec2
// Fragment shader computes stripe pattern + radial cursor spotlight
// See full source in raw/animations_012.md
```

## Notes
- Requires OGL (~100 KB). Lazy-load for performance.
